title: dactylorhiza × claudiopolitana nothosubsp. claudiopolitana
intro: Dactylorhiza × claudiopolitana nothosubsp. claudiopolitana, a hybrid orchid, is a nothosubspecies of the Dactylorhiza genus, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza iberica and Dactylorhiza sambucina. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × claudiopolitana nothosubsp. claudiopolitana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
